name: filekey-ref
description: Reference implementation of FileKey: passkey + PRF end-to-end file encryption.

scripts.build:web: bun run web/gen-source.ts && bun build web/app.ts web/worker.ts web/selftest.ts --outdir web/dist --target browser --minify && bun run web/build-recover.ts && bun run web/build-blog.ts
